passiveAbilities.name: Razor Claws
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1. If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +3.

passiveAbilities.name: Amphibious
passiveAbilities.description: This character may Jog freely over Water Feature terrain and gains +1 energy during the Replenish Step if any part of its base is within a Water Feature.

arcaneAbilities.name: Vomit
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target character suffers X+1 Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This models suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Insatiable Hunger
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is slain, and this character is not slain, then this character recovers all Wds and all energy.
